error.signature: OpenCV: FFMPEG: tag 0x34363248/'H264' is not supported with codec id 27

verdict.summary: VideoWriter cannot find the requested codec fourcc. Codec not installed or not compiled into FFmpeg backend.

dead_ends.action: Use raw/uncompressed fourcc to avoid codec issues
dead_ends.why_fails: Uncompressed video produces enormous files (1080p@30fps ~ 5.6 GB/min). Not a practical solution.
OpenCV uses its bundled FFmpeg or system FFmpeg. Random codec packs do not affect it.

workarounds.how: fourcc = cv2.VideoWriter_fourcc(*'mp4v')  # MPEG-4 is nearly universally available

workarounds.action: Install FFmpeg with the required codec
workarounds.how: sudo apt install ffmpeg libx264-dev && pip install --force-reinstall opencv-python
print(cv2.getBuildInformation())  # check FFMPEG section for enabled codecs
